questions.q: Choose the correct passive voice form of: "They are building a new mall."

opts: A new mall is being built by them.
A new mall was being built by them.
A new mall is built by them.
A new mall was built by them.
opts_hi: A new mall is being built by them.
A new mall was being built by them.
A new mall is built by them.
A new mall was built by them.
